here, yeah.

thoughtfulness on that.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between GrowthX and Braze to assess partnership readiness and address potential concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Braze's main hurdle: internal resourcing constraints (content team understaffed, key role vacant)](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [GrowthX clarified onboarding process: 6-8 week ramp-up, adaptable time commitment (1hr/wk initially, then \~30min/wk)](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Procurement process at Braze is lengthy; team to explore initiating it parallel to hiring](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Both parties agree to reconnect in \~1 month to reassess partnership timing](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)

## Topics

### Braze's Current Situation

  - [Content team understaffed; missing senior leadership role](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Actively interviewing (10 interviews/week) for senior content position](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Hesitant to onboard new vendor without proper internal support](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Roles open in New York and San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### GrowthX Onboarding Process

  - [Week 1: 1-hour kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Week 2: Shape writing guidelines, content strategy (\~1hr total + 30min review)](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Week 3: Mostly aligned, start execution](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Week 4+: Begin publishing content, calibrating quality](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Time commitment: 1hr/wk for first 2 weeks, then as low as 30min/wk](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Adaptable process: can be hands-off (e.g., Engine.com, Augment Code)](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Some clients operate without marketing teams (e.g., Monograph, Tavern AI)](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Procurement and Timeline

  - [Braze's procurement process is lengthy](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [GrowthX currently booking kickoffs for Sept 15th onwards](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Limited to 2 kickoffs/week to ensure quality onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [Exploring possibility of starting procurement process in parallel with hiring](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)

### Networking and Hiring Support

  - [GrowthX offered to leverage their network for Braze's hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Kyle & Marcel familiar with SF tech scene](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [GrowthX hosting an event at Inbound with potential hires](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Braze to internally discuss initiating procurement process in parallel with hiring](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [GrowthX to send job posting details for potential referrals](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Reconnect async in \~1 month to reassess partnership timing](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [GrowthX to send info about their upcoming Inbound event](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Braze to review GrowthX's adaptable onboarding process for resource planning](https://fathom.video/share/yeD8qw1wQ7RYN5vLhNMVfv-8dr2yzsY8?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)

action_items.description: Send GrowthX team job description for senior leadership role (NY or SF)
Internal discussion re: starting procurement process w/ GrowthX while awaiting new hire
Set reminder for 1-month async check-in w/ Braze team
